name: tf20-website-portal
description: Task Force 20 public website and protected personnel portal backend scaffold.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check cpanel-server.cjs && node --check src/server/app.js && node --check src/server/config.js && node --check src/server/db.js && node --check src/server/middleware/auth.js && node --check src/server/routes/api.js && node --check src/server/routes/pages.js && node --check src/server/services/discord-guild-sync.js && node --check src/server/services/users.js && node --check src/server/services/portal-data.js && node --check src/server/services/portal-pages.js && node --check src/server/services/session-store.js && node --check src/server/services/steam.js && node --check src/server/services/unit-hierarchy.js && node --check prisma/seed.mjs && node --check scripts/airtable-import-preview.mjs && node --check scripts/airtable-import.mjs && node --check scripts/airtable-sync.mjs && node --check scripts/backup-database.mjs && node --check scripts/discord-guild-backfill.mjs && node --check scripts/discord-guild-reconcile.mjs && node --check scripts/portal-access-audit.mjs && node --check scripts/production-readiness-audit.mjs && node --check scripts/roster-csv-to-json.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-server.mjs && node --check portal.js && for file in portal-scripts/*.js; do node --check "$file"; done
